task_description: Wave 1 - Convert QuantAds to Next.js App Router with @quant/shared-ui adoption, brand tokens, dark mode, and proper route pages for campaign management, targeting, and analytics. Phase 64.1 tests already pass (all 9 packages meet targets), auth typecheck is already green.

verification.summary: All 128 packages typecheck clean. All 132 test tasks pass (including QuantAds 102 tests). QuantAds now has Next.js App Router with 4 pages using @quant/shared-ui components.
